description: Treatment arm labels swapped — the Experimental arm data is displayed under the Control header and vice versa. This is a common transcription error in table composition.

TC-002.note: NOTE: The mean age is 55.1 in the Control arm (usually younger) but the SAP expects Experimental to have younger patients based on randomization. The means appear swapped between arms.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: Arm labels must match SAP treatment assignment
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag potential label swap: Control arm has characteristics inconsistent with known randomization (age distribution, sex ratio)

metadata.notes: Subtle error — requires cross-referencing with expected demographic profiles. May not be caught by automated N-count checks alone.
